items.title: 古驰美妆授权易主：科蒂提前交还，欧莱雅拿下50年长约
items.summary: Kering announced Gucci signed a 50-year exclusive beauty licensing deal with L'Oreal, moving the transition up a year to July 2027; outgoing licensee Coty will hand back the business and receive roughly $400M compensation ($250M cash upfront, plus up to $1.5B/$30M in further/conditional payments per other reporting). Analysts frame it as luxury brands consolidating beauty partnerships with category leaders rather than specialized outsourcers; for China, L'Oreal's local R&D and e-commerce infrastructure could enable more localized Gucci Beauty products, though avoiding overlap with L'Oreal's existing luxury lines (Lancome, YSL, Armani) is flagged as a challenge.

items.title: 27亿"分手费"，50年独家授权！欧莱雅押注古驰美妆，重仓香水赛道
items.summary: Business-press take on the Gucci Beauty licensing handover, framing the ~2.7 billion yuan compensation to Coty as a "breakup fee" and describing L'Oreal's move as a heavy bet on the fragrance category. Notes Gucci Beauty currently runs 65 offline stores across major Chinese cities with Tmall as its primary online channel, and flags the risk of brand homogenization given L'Oreal's existing luxury beauty portfolio.

items.title: 张凌赫95后男演员登《嘉人》七月刊封面 三个月连登两大女刊为何引发风格争议
items.summary: Coverage of Gucci China ambassador Zhang Linghe's exclusive-backed solo cover on Marie Claire China's July issue, described as the only male celebrity to get Gucci's dedicated push on that title in a decade. Sparks split reaction: supporters praise his fit with the brand's minimal aesthetic, critics say he leans on a repetitive "safe" styling template and lacks range; a side debate over past heavy stage makeup adds a cross-cultural aesthetics angle.

items.title: 张凌赫 95后男演员 2026年在手代言有多少？怎么回事
items.summary: Roundup of Zhang Linghe's 2026 brand-ambassador roster (Gucci among Bulgari, Chopard and others), examining how the actor picked up four brand deals within a month and whether the pace of luxury endorsements is sustainable or diluting exclusivity for any single house including Gucci.

items.title: 「グッチ フローラ」が新フレグランス発売 香水着想の限定メイクアップコレクションも
items.summary: Gucci Beauty will launch Gucci Flora Gorgeous Orchid Eau de Parfum Intense on September 1, its highest-concentration Flora scent yet, alongside a limited makeup collection (10-shade eyeshadow palette, two lipsticks) fronted by Miley Cyrus. Standard product-launch trade coverage via official brand messaging.

items.title: 구찌, 여름 스타일링 화보 공개
items.summary: Korean fashion-media roundup styling Gucci's iconic bags, floral dresses, sunglasses and a folding fan for a summer editorial. Standard activation-style seasonal styling coverage, not independent commentary.

items.title: 张凌赫粉丝后援会围绕Gucci嘉人封面维权/应援讨论
items.summary: Fan community activity on Weibo's Zhang Linghe super-topic tied to his Gucci-backed Marie Claire cover, mixing celebratory fan posts with a separate July 6 fan-club statement objecting to a co-agency casting decision; illustrates organized fandom volume rather than organic broad-public sentiment. Engagement figures for the specific super-topic thread not independently visible on this search pass.

items.title: 아니, 한남동 '구찌 가옥' 폐점하나요?(했나요?)
items.summary: Korean Threads user questioning whether Gucci's Hannam-dong 'Gucci Gaok' flagship has closed, citing the disappearance of the adjacent Foundry Seoul gallery from map listings. Small organic post reflecting on-the-ground consumer uncertainty about Gucci Seoul's retail footprint; carried over from prior day's pool as no newer confirmation or refutation surfaced today.

items.title: 명품 갤러리 구찌 정가품/시세 문의 스레드 다수
items.summary: Korea's largest luxury-goods community board (DCInside 명품 갤러리) continues to host frequent Gucci-related threads on authentication requests, resale/secondhand pricing questions and general product discussion; reflects steady grassroots consumer engagement volume but skews toward transactional/authentication questions rather than brand-sentiment commentary. No single thread had a stable permalink with visible engagement counts at time of collection.

items.title: グッチ ビューティ フローラ ゴージャス ガーデニア オードパルファムの口コミ
items.summary: Japanese beauty-review community aggregation (@cosme) for the Gucci Flora Gorgeous Gardenia fragrance shows generally positive organic user reviews praising the scent as elegant and fresh with lasting depth, consistent with the broader Flora line's positive consumer reputation ahead of the September Orchid Intense launch. Individual review counts/star ratings not extracted in this pass.
